nodes.itemHTML: • PowerShell Test Gallery - A test version of the PowerShell Gallery. Useful when developing new modules.
• Coder for Raspberry Pi - A open source project by Googlers to turn a Raspberry Pi into a simple, tiny, personal web server and web-based development environment.
• Network Presence Detector - Setup a Pi Zero to scan for devices on a WiFi network and use that to determine who is "home".
• P4wnP1stars3.2k - P4wnP1 is a highly customizable USB attack platform, based on a low cost Raspberry Pi Zero or Raspberry Pi Zero W (required for HID backdoor).

• PoisonTapstars5.5k - Exploits locked/password protected computers over USB, drops persistent WebSocket-based backdoor, exposes internal router, and siphons cookies using Raspberry Pi Zero & Node.js.
• ASP.NET Community Standup: Entity Framework Core in Blazor - June 24, 2020 - ASP.NET Community Standup: EF Core in Blazor.
• ASP.NET Community Standup: Blazor Mobile Bindings - June 23, 2020 - ASP.NET Community Standup: Blazor Mobile Bindings, with Eilon Lipton.
• Blazing into Summer with Ed Charbeneau - June 25, 2020 - Blazing into Summer with Ed Charbeneau, by The DOT.NET Docs Show.

• Blazor Train: Blazor Component Life Cycle - June 26, 2020 - Blazor Train: Blazor Component Life Cycle. What is a Blazor Component? How long does it live? How can we hook it to make sure our app behaves properly? This episode of Blazor Train covers all about the component life cycle.
• react-native-leveldownstars21 - Native LevelDB bindings for React Native
• command-not-foundstars18 - A mirror of the oh-my-zsh command-not-found plugin so you don't have to include all of oh-my-zsh.
• direnvstars2 - A plugin for installing and loading direnvstars7.4k. Inspired by zsh-pyenvstars15.

• dwimstars79 - Attempts to predict what you will want to do next. It provides a key binding (control-u) that will replace the current (or previous) command line with the command you will want to run next.
• fzf-fasdstars43 - Integrates fzfstars36.6k and fasdstars5.4k --- tab completion of z with fzf's fuzzy search!
• git-complete-urlsstars0 - Enhance git completion to include in the remotes completion (e.g. from git clone) any URL in the clipboard.
• gvm (dgnest)stars4 - A gvm (Go version manager) plugin for ZSH.

• history-popupstars0 - Captures the PageUp key and uses dialog to open a popup menu with the history, so the user can interactively navigate through it and pick the history line to bring back to the prompt.
• history-search-multi-wordstars325 - A syntax highlighted, multi-word history searcher for ZSH, bound to Ctrl-R, with advanced functions (e.g. bump of history entry to top of history).

• homeassistant-clistars2 - Provides completion and (configuration) helpers for the Home Assistant Command-line interface (hass-cli)stars255. and allows command line interaction with Home Assistant instances.
• ingstars2 - Streamlined ping output.
• ipipstars13 - Plugin for IPIP.
• jdk-switchstars4 - A macOS-only plugin for switching between jdk versions.
• npmsstars5 - Utility powered by fzf for using npm scripts interactively. Requires fzfstars36.6k and jq.
• nvm-auto-usestars14 - Calls nvm use automatically whenever you enter a directory that contains an .nvmrc file with a string telling nvm which node to use.
• oathstars5 - Manages 2FA authentication 6 digit tokens. It was highly inspired by this article about using oathtool for 2 step verification.
• q (cal2195)stars46 - Add vim-like macro registers to your ZSH shell.
• razer-status-codestars3 - Change the colour of your Razer Mouse based on the status of the last executed command. Requires OpenRazer linux drivers.
• tab-titlestars9 - Set the terminal tab title according to current directory or running process. Forked from termsupport.zsh

• vagrant-box-wrapperstars1 - A wrapper plugin for vagrant that allows for calling vagrant commands from outside of the box directory. The plugin also ships with a few extra commands that help to manage more than one box, along with custom tab-completion.
• viexchangestars8 - A vi mode plugin for easily swapping text between two places in the buffer, like vim-exchange.
• zinit-consolestars20 – A semigraphical (curses) consolette for zinit plugin manager.
• Wrabit - Build a daily writing habit while contributing to mental health research.
• react-native-google-nearby-messages ★14stars57 - Communicate with nearby devices using Bluetooth, BLE, WiFi and near-ultrasonic audio by using the Google Nearby Messages API
• react-native-blurhash ★105stars484 - Give your users the loading experience they want.
• Appcircle.io — Automated mobile CI/CD/CT for iOS with online device simulators
• HAProxystars2k - Reliable, high Performance TCP/HTTP load balancer.
• Celerystars17.2k - Asynchronous task queue/job queue based on distributed message passing. Focused on real-time operation and supports scheduling.
• QUIC-Transport - A UDP-based multiplexed and secure transport.
• Building Microservices? Here is What You Should Know - A practical overview, based on real-world experience, of what one would need to know in order to build microservices.

• OIDCONN - OpenID Connect 1.0 is a simple identity layer on top of the OAuth 2.0 protocol. It allows clients to verify the identity of the end-user based on the authentication performed by an Authorization Server, as well as to obtain basic profile information about the end-user in an interoperable and REST-like manner.
• PASETO - Paseto is everything you love about JOSE (JWT, JWE, JWS) without any of the many design deficits that plague the JOSE standards. DRAFT
• vuetify-i18n-boilerplatestars4 - Demo - A boilerplate to quickly start a Vue project using Vuetify, Vue-i18n, Vuex and Vue-router
• appcircle.io — Automated mobile CI/CD/CT for iOS and Android with online device emulators.
• How to build and deploy React Native apps for iOS and Android automatically with Appcircle CI/CD
• Cloud Alchemy Ansible roles - Ansible roles to manage Prometheus, Alertmanager, Grafana, and commond Prometheus exporters.
• Monitoring mixins - Community managed bundles of alerts, recording rules, and Grafana dashboards.
• Official Prometheus demo - Official Prometheus demo site managed by Cloud Alchemy Ansible roles updating daily using configuration from Prometheus repositorystars45.
• Build a Blazor WebAssembly line of business app - June, 2020 - Build a Blazor WebAssembly line of business app. Part 1. Part 2. Part 3. Part 4. Source codestars112 .

• Create a small blog in Blazor - June, 2020 - Create a small blog in Blazor, by RoundTheCode. Part 1: Create application in Visual Studio. Part 2: Entity Framework integration. Part 3: Build Entity Framework queries. Part 4: Build Category and Page Razor Components.
• gRPC-Webstars11 - Sample about gRPC-Web and Blazor WebAssembly.
• How to utilize gRPC-Web from a Blazor WebAssembly application - June 19, 2020 - How to utilize gRPC-Web from a Blazor WebAssembly application. Source codestars11 .

• ASP.NET Core updates in .NET 5 Preview 6 - June 25, 2020 - .NET 5 Preview 6 is now available and is ready for evaluation. Here’s what’s new in this release: Blazor WebAssembly template now included, JSON extension methods for HttpRequest and HttpResponse, extension method to allow anonymous access to an endpoint, custom handling of authorization failures and SignalR Hub filters.
